title: schoenus globosus
intro: Schoenus globosus, also known as the globe sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the cattail family and is native to Australia. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Schoenus globosus has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to provide several health benefits, including reducing swelling and pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Schoenus globosus are often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions.
